audience_policies.source_phrase: Coupon pass admits four visitors to the Aviation Museum of New Hampshire free of charge. Regular admission rates are $15 for people 13 and older, $7.50 for seniors, veterans, and children 6-12. Children 5 years old and younger are always free. Pass is only valid on the day of the

coupon.source_phrase_block: Coupon pass admits four visitors to the Aviation Museum of New Hampshire free of charge. Regular admission rates are $15 for people 13 and older, $7.50 for seniors, veterans, and children 6-12. Children 5 years old and younger are always free. Pass is only valid on the day of the reservation.
